narrative:
W Lafayette (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,355 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points.
